reviews.review_description: It could be a good game but it is gichy and I want a movement system for the vr mode

developer_response.body: Ugh, sorry you hit those issues. That's on me. I'm patching things as fast as I can post-launch. And honestly, the movement system idea for VR mode is something I had not thought of yet. I'll consider that an add for the next update. For the refund, that goes through Meta directly: https://www.meta.com/help. Hopefully you'll give it another shot down the road once things are smoother.
